arabic: الصِّدْقُ خُلُقٌ عَظِيمٌ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ. قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثُ ٦٠٩٤]. يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَقُولَ الْحَقَّ دَائِمًا فِي حَيَاتِهِ. الصِّدْقُ يَبْنِي الثِّقَةَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ وَيَنْشُرُ الْمَحَبَّةَ. مَنْ كَانَ صَادِقًا، أَحَبَّهُ اللهُ وَأَحَبَّهُ النَّاسُ جَمِيعًا.
translation: Istinoljubivost je plemenit moral u islamu. Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Zaista istina vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet' [Buhari]. Musliman mora uvijek govoriti istinu u svom životu. Iskrenost gradi povjerenje među ljudima i širi ljubav. Ko bude iskren, voljet će ga Allah i voljet će ga svi ljudi.
translationEn: Truthfulness is a great character trait in Islam. The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Indeed, truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Reported by al-Bukhari]. A Muslim must always speak the truth in his life. Honesty builds trust between people and spreads love. Whoever is truthful will be loved by Allah and by all people.
